checks.description: Verify that the product output equals the unsigned multiplication of the driven inputs for the basic stimulus.
checks.pass_condition: When done becomes asserted, yout must equal 1 * 2 (decimal 2).
checks.trigger_condition: When the basic_001 stimulus drives ain=1, bin=2 and start is asserted.

checks.description: Verify that the product output equals the unsigned multiplication of the maximum 16‑bit inputs for the edge stimulus.
checks.pass_condition: When done becomes asserted, yout must equal 65535 * 65535 (decimal 4294836225).
checks.trigger_condition: When the edge_001 stimulus drives ain=65535, bin=65535 and start is asserted.

checks.description: Ensure that a done pulse is only considered a completion after a preceding start event in the same scenario.
checks.pass_condition: Every observed done must be preceded by a start that occurred earlier in simulation time without an intervening reset.
checks.trigger_condition: When the protocol_001 case observes start and done signals.

checks.description: Verify that after reset release, yout and done settle to a defined stable state before any start is issued.
checks.pass_condition: No transition of yout or done occurs for at least two clock cycles after rst_n is deasserted.
checks.trigger_condition: When the reset_001 case releases rst_n.
